parameters.query: UPDATE scan_jobs SET status='completed', completed_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $('Create Scan Job').first().json.id }}';

meta.description: RECON OS WF-05: DNS Recon — passive DNS enumeration using DNS-over-HTTPS (Google) and Certificate Transparency (crt.sh). Discovers and registers subdomains. Safe, rate-limited, no brute force.
